---
title: "50by30 Microdata Pipeline"
---

## About This Document

This book documents the data pipeline used to **harmonize, upload, review, and
distribute** microdata used to monitor the UNHCR **50by30 vision**: that 50 percent
of refugees in protracted crises are self-reliant by 2035.

## The Pipeline at a Glance

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-pipeline
%%| fig-cap: "The 50by30 microdata pipeline, from raw survey to distribution."
flowchart TB
    src([Survey producer<br/>raw microdata])

    subgraph s1 ["1 · Raw upload"]
        direction TB
        chk{Already on<br/>Datalibweb?}
        up1[primus upload<br/>type=raw]
        chk -->|no| up1
    end

    subgraph s2 ["2 · Harmonization"]
        direction TB
        harm[Map to 50by30 schema<br/>welfare · welfare_self · weight]
    end

    subgraph s3 ["3 · Upload, review &amp; approval"]
        direction TB
        up2[primus upload<br/>harmonized file]
        rev{Reviewer}
        up2 --> rev
    end

    dist[(Datalibweb<br/>approved &amp; distributed)]

    src --> chk
    chk -->|yes| harm
    up1 --> harm
    harm --> up2
    rev -->|approve| dist
    rev -->|reject| harm

    classDef store fill:#e8f0fe,stroke:#4285f4,color:#174ea6;
    class dist store;
```

The pipeline has three steps:

1. **[Raw upload](chapters/02-raw-upload.qmd)** — raw survey microdata is uploaded
   to Datalibweb via **PRIMUS**, unless it is already available there.
2. **[Harmonization](chapters/03-harmonization.qmd)** — raw data is harmonized to
   the common 50by30 schema.
3. **[Upload, review & approval](chapters/04-review-approval.qmd)** — harmonized
   files are uploaded and reviewed; approved files are published and made available
   for distribution from Datalibweb.

## Core Harmonized Schema

Every harmonized file must conform to the [50by30 schema](chapters/05-schema.qmd).
The core variables are:

| Variable | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `welfare` | **Mandatory** | Household welfare aggregate (consumption or income) |
| `welfare_self` | **Mandatory** | Self-reliance-adjusted welfare measure |
| `weight` | **Mandatory** | Sampling weight |
| `age` | Optional | Age of the individual, in years |
| `educat4` | Optional | Educational attainment, 4-category classification |

See the [Schema & Variable Dictionary](chapters/05-schema.qmd) for the full list,
value ranges, and labeling conventions.

::: {.bg-light-yellow .pa3 .br2 .f6}
**Status:** This is a living document under active development.
See the [contributor guide](wiki/contributing.md) before making changes.
:::
